title: NPC Autopilot
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot for D&D 5e. v3.9.1: fix unregistered settings crash (npcVision, npcDoorAware, npcPathfinding now registered on init). v3.9.0: NPC Vision (LOS), door detection, wall-aware pathfinding, last-known-position tracking. v3.8.4: native thrown-weapon drops. v3.8.0: Ollama Bridge AI narration.
